nasb.text: Moses took the bones of Joseph with him, for he had made the sons of Israel solemnly swear, saying, “God will surely take care of you, and you shall carry my bones from here with you.”

esv.text: Moses took the bones of Joseph with him, for Joseph had made the sons of Israel solemnly swear, saying, “God will surely visit you, and you shall carry up my bones with you from here.”

cnv.text: 摩西帶了約瑟的骸骨同去，因為約瑟曾經叫以色列人嚴肅地起誓，說：“　神必定眷顧你們；你們要把我的骸骨從這裡也一同帶去。”

ccb.text: 摩西把约瑟的骸骨一起带走，因为约瑟曾叫以色列人郑重发誓，对他们说：“上帝必眷顾你们，把你们带出埃及，那时你们要把我的骸骨也一起带走。”
